requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance & Labelling — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Cambodia energy programmes)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效与标签——家用制冷器具（柬埔寨能源计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效與標籤——家用製冷器具（柬埔寨能源計劃）

summary.en: Cambodia administers energy-efficiency programmes for appliances under its energy authorities, developed in cooperation with ASEAN regional energy-efficiency initiatives (such as ASEAN SHINE) and harmonised test methods. For refrigerating appliances the test basis is typically the IEC 62552 series (methods for measuring performance) as adopted into Cambodia Standards (CS) by the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC). Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy-labelling schemes have been progressively introduced in Cambodia, but coverage, thresholds, and the mandatory/voluntary status for refrigerators are programme-specific and evolving. Exporters and importers should confirm with the relevant Cambodian energy programme and ISC whether MEPS and an energy label are currently mandatory for the specific refrigerator model, the applicable CS/IEC 62552 test method, and any registration or in-country verification carried out by the importer.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨在其能源主管部门下实施器具能效计划，并与东盟区域能效倡议（如ASEAN SHINE）合作开发，采用统一的测试方法。对于制冷器具，测试依据通常为IEC 62552系列（性能测量方法），经柬埔寨标准局（ISC）采纳为柬埔寨标准（CS）。柬埔寨已逐步引入最低能效标准（MEPS）与能效标签机制，但其覆盖范围、门槛值及对冰箱的强制／自愿状态因计划而异且仍在演变。出口商与进口商应向相关柬埔寨能源计划及ISC确认：特定冰箱型号当前是否强制实施MEPS与能效标签、适用的CS/IEC 62552测试方法，以及由进口商执行的任何登记或在地验证。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨在其能源主管部門下實施器具能效計劃，並與東盟區域能效倡議（如ASEAN SHINE）合作開發，採用統一的測試方法。對於製冷器具，測試依據通常為IEC 62552系列（性能測量方法），經柬埔寨標準局（ISC）採納為柬埔寨標準（CS）。柬埔寨已逐步引入最低能效標準（MEPS）與能效標籤機制，但其覆蓋範圍、門檻值及對冰箱的強制／自願狀態因計劃而異且仍在演變。出口商與進口商應向相關柬埔寨能源計劃及ISC確認：特定冰箱型號當前是否強制實施MEPS與能效標籤、適用的CS/IEC 62552測試方法，以及由進口商執行的任何登記或在地驗證。

standards_or_laws: Cambodia energy-efficiency programmes (administered by Cambodian energy authorities; developed with ASEAN regional initiatives such as ASEAN SHINE)
IEC 62552 series — household refrigerating appliances: characteristics and test methods, as adopted into Cambodia Standards (CS) by ISC
Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy-labelling schemes — coverage and mandatory status to be confirmed per model with the Cambodian energy programme and ISC

summary.en: China regulates refrigerator energy efficiency under GB 12021.2 (energy consumption limits and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators), with the China Energy Label (CEL) registration scheme administered by the China Energy Label Center. The Chinese test methodology and grading are based on GB methods aligned to the IEC 62552 series, but the grade boundaries, reference volumes, and label format are China-specific. A Chinese CEL grade and registration do not transfer to Cambodia; if Cambodia requires MEPS compliance or an energy label, the energy performance must be assessed against the Cambodian programme's thresholds and test method, which differ in methodology and pass/fail boundaries from GB 12021.2.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱耗电量限值及能效等级）监管冰箱能效，并由中国能效标识管理中心实施中国能效标识（CEL）登记制度。中国测试方法与分级以与IEC 62552系列对齐的GB方法为基础，但等级界限、参照容积与标签格式为中国专属。中国CEL等级与登记不可转用于柬埔寨；若柬埔寨要求MEPS合规或能效标签，则须依据柬埔寨计划的门槛值与测试方法评估能效，其方法与合格／不合格界限与GB 12021.2不同。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱耗電量限值及能效等級）監管冰箱能效，並由中國能效標識管理中心實施中國能效標識（CEL）登記制度。中國測試方法與分級以與IEC 62552系列對齊的GB方法為基礎，但等級界限、參照容積與標籤格式為中國專屬。中國CEL等級與登記不可轉用於柬埔寨；若柬埔寨要求MEPS合規或能效標籤，則須依據柬埔寨計劃的門檻值與測試方法評估能效，其方法與合格／不合格界限與GB 12021.2不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Energy consumption limits and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory)
China Energy Label (CEL) registration — administered by the China Energy Label Center / China National Institute of Standardization

gap.en: Both China (GB 12021.2) and Cambodia (CS/IEC 62552-based programmes) ultimately reference the IEC 62552 measurement family, so the raw consumption test data may be reusable, but the energy-efficiency grading and pass/fail thresholds differ: (1) a Chinese CEL grade does not map to Cambodian MEPS thresholds — energy performance may need to be recalculated and re-graded to the Cambodian programme's methodology; (2) if Cambodia requires an energy label for the model, a Cambodian label (not the China Energy Label) must be applied; (3) the mandatory/voluntary status and applicable thresholds are programme-specific and evolving, so they must be confirmed per model with the Cambodian energy programme and ISC. Exporters should not assume the Chinese CEL satisfies Cambodian energy requirements.
gap.zh: 中国（GB 12021.2）与柬埔寨（基于CS/IEC 62552的计划）最终均参照IEC 62552测量体系，故原始能耗测试数据可能可复用，但能效分级与合格／不合格门槛不同：（1）中国CEL等级无法对应柬埔寨MEPS门槛——可能需按柬埔寨计划方法重新计算并重新分级能效；（2）若柬埔寨对该型号要求能效标签，须粘贴柬埔寨标签（而非中国能效标识）；（3）强制／自愿状态及适用门槛因计划而异且仍在演变，须就每个型号向柬埔寨能源计划及ISC确认。出口商不应假设中国CEL能满足柬埔寨能效要求。
gap.zht: 中國（GB 12021.2）與柬埔寨（基於CS/IEC 62552的計劃）最終均參照IEC 62552測量體系，故原始能耗測試數據可能可複用，但能效分級與合格／不合格門檻不同：（1）中國CEL等級無法對應柬埔寨MEPS門檻——可能需按柬埔寨計劃方法重新計算並重新分級能效；（2）若柬埔寨對該型號要求能效標籤，須黏貼柬埔寨標籤（而非中國能效標識）；（3）強制／自願狀態及適用門檻因計劃而異且仍在演變，須就每個型號向柬埔寨能源計劃及ISC確認。出口商不應假設中國CEL能滿足柬埔寨能效要求。

mandatory_status.target: Cambodia operates appliance energy-efficiency programmes (MEPS / energy labelling) developed with ASEAN initiatives; mandatory status and thresholds for refrigerators are programme-specific and evolving — confirm per model with the Cambodian energy programme and ISC. Test basis aligns to IEC 62552 as adopted into CS
mandatory_status.cn: GB 12021.2 is mandatory; China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for refrigerators placed on the China market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia runs appliance energy-efficiency programmes (MEPS / labelling) built on the IEC 62552 test family, as does China's GB 12021.2, so raw consumption test data may be reusable. However, energy-efficiency grades and thresholds differ, and the Chinese CEL grade and label do not transfer. Confirm with the Cambodian energy programme and ISC whether MEPS and a Cambodian energy label are mandatory for the specific model, and re-grade energy performance to the Cambodian methodology if required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨实施基于IEC 62552测试体系的器具能效计划（MEPS／标签），与中国GB 12021.2相同，故原始能耗测试数据可能可复用。但能效等级与门槛不同，中国CEL等级与标签不可转用。请向柬埔寨能源计划及ISC确认特定型号是否强制实施MEPS与柬埔寨能效标签，并在需要时按柬埔寨方法重新分级能效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨實施基於IEC 62552測試體系的器具能效計劃（MEPS／標籤），與中國GB 12021.2相同，故原始能耗測試數據可能可複用。但能效等級與門檻不同，中國CEL等級與標籤不可轉用。請向柬埔寨能源計劃及ISC確認特定型號是否強制實施MEPS與柬埔寨能效標籤，並在需要時按柬埔寨方法重新分級能效。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage & Frequency Fit — 230 V / 50 Hz Cambodia vs 220/380 V China
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率适配——柬埔寨230 V / 50 Hz 对比中国220/380 V
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率適配——柬埔寨230 V / 50 Hz 對比中國220/380 V

summary.en: Cambodia's mains supply is nominally 230 V at 50 Hz for single-phase household use. The 50 Hz supply frequency is the same as China's, so compressor motor speed, timing, and frequency-dependent performance translate directly without frequency-related redesign. The nominal voltage of 230 V differs from China's nominal 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase). For a household refrigerator the practical impact is usually minor because appliances are designed to a tolerance band (commonly 220–240 V) that covers both 220 V and 230 V nominal supplies, but exporters should confirm the rated voltage range marked on the rating plate covers 230 V and that protective components, thermostats, and any electronics are validated across the Cambodian supply tolerance. The plug/socket interface should also be verified against Cambodian practice.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨民用单相电网标称为230 V、50 Hz。50 Hz供电频率与中国相同，故压缩机电机转速、定时及与频率相关的性能可直接沿用，无需进行与频率相关的重新设计。标称电压230 V与中国标称220 V（单相）／380 V（三相）不同。对于家用冰箱，实际影响通常较小，因为器具按容差带（常见220–240 V）设计，可同时覆盖220 V与230 V标称供电，但出口商应确认铭牌标注的额定电压范围覆盖230 V，并验证保护元件、温控器及任何电子设备在柬埔寨供电容差范围内有效。插头／插座接口也应对照柬埔寨惯例核实。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨民用單相電網標稱為230 V、50 Hz。50 Hz供電頻率與中國相同，故壓縮機電機轉速、定時及與頻率相關的性能可直接沿用，無需進行與頻率相關的重新設計。標稱電壓230 V與中國標稱220 V（單相）／380 V（三相）不同。對於家用冰箱，實際影響通常較小，因為器具按容差帶（常見220–240 V）設計，可同時覆蓋220 V與230 V標稱供電，但出口商應確認銘牌標註的額定電壓範圍覆蓋230 V，並驗證保護元件、溫控器及任何電子設備在柬埔寨供電容差範圍內有效。插頭／插座接口也應對照柬埔寨慣例核實。

standards_or_laws: Cambodia mains supply — nominally 230 V, 50 Hz (single-phase household)
Rating-plate voltage range and marking — to be validated against the Cambodian supply (commonly 220–240 V tolerance band)
IEC 60335-1 / IEC 60335-2-24 — rated voltage and electrical safety provisions, as adopted into Cambodia Standards (CS) by ISC

summary.en: China's domestic mains supply is nominally 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Chinese household refrigerators are designed and rated to GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1 for the Chinese supply, with rating plates typically marked at 220 V. Because Cambodia and China share the same 50 Hz frequency, no frequency-related modification is needed. The voltage difference (China 220 V vs Cambodia 230 V) is normally within the appliance's design tolerance, but the rating-plate marking, protective devices, and electronics validation for the Cambodian 230 V supply should be confirmed rather than assumed from the Chinese 220 V rating.
summary.zh: 中国民用电网标称为220 V单相、380 V三相，频率50 Hz。中国家用冰箱依GB 4706.13／GB 4706.1按中国供电设计与额定，铭牌通常标注220 V。由于柬埔寨与中国同为50 Hz频率，无需进行与频率相关的修改。电压差异（中国220 V对柬埔寨230 V）通常在器具设计容差范围内，但应就柬埔寨230 V供电确认铭牌标注、保护装置及电子设备验证，而非由中国220 V额定值直接假定。
summary.zht: 中國民用電網標稱為220 V單相、380 V三相，頻率50 Hz。中國家用冰箱依GB 4706.13／GB 4706.1按中國供電設計與額定，銘牌通常標註220 V。由於柬埔寨與中國同為50 Hz頻率，無需進行與頻率相關的修改。電壓差異（中國220 V對柬埔寨230 V）通常在器具設計容差範圍內，但應就柬埔寨230 V供電確認銘牌標註、保護裝置及電子設備驗證，而非由中國220 V額定值直接假定。

standards_or_laws: China mains supply — nominally 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz
GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1 — rated-voltage and electrical safety provisions for the Chinese supply (rating plate typically marked 220 V)

gap.en: The frequency is identical (both 50 Hz), so there is no frequency-related gap — a significant advantage over markets on 60 Hz or dual-frequency grids. The only voltage-related gap is the nominal step from China's 220 V to Cambodia's 230 V, which normally falls inside the appliance's rated tolerance band (often 220–240 V). The practical action is documentation, not redesign: (1) confirm the rating-plate voltage range marked on units shipped to Cambodia covers 230 V; (2) verify protective components, thermostats, and any control electronics are validated across the Cambodian supply tolerance; (3) verify the plug/socket interface matches Cambodian practice. No frequency conversion or compressor redesign is required.
gap.zh: 频率完全相同（均为50 Hz），故无与频率相关的差距——相较60 Hz或双频电网市场具明显优势。唯一与电压相关的差距是从中国220 V到柬埔寨230 V的标称跨度，通常落在器具的额定容差带内（常见220–240 V）。实际措施是文件而非重新设计：（1）确认运往柬埔寨产品铭牌标注的电压范围覆盖230 V；（2）验证保护元件、温控器及任何控制电子设备在柬埔寨供电容差范围内有效；（3）核实插头／插座接口符合柬埔寨惯例。无需频率转换或压缩机重新设计。
gap.zht: 頻率完全相同（均為50 Hz），故無與頻率相關的差距——相較60 Hz或雙頻電網市場具明顯優勢。唯一與電壓相關的差距是從中國220 V到柬埔寨230 V的標稱跨度，通常落在器具的額定容差帶內（常見220–240 V）。實際措施是文件而非重新設計：（1）確認運往柬埔寨產品銘牌標註的電壓範圍覆蓋230 V；（2）驗證保護元件、溫控器及任何控制電子設備在柬埔寨供電容差範圍內有效；（3）核實插頭／插座接口符合柬埔寨慣例。無需頻率轉換或壓縮機重新設計。

mandatory_status.target: Informational electrical-fit consideration, not a standalone certification step. Cambodia supply is nominally 230 V / 50 Hz; rating-plate voltage range and electrical-safety validation are enforced through CS/IEC 60335 conformity and import inspection
mandatory_status.cn: China supply is nominally 220 V / 380 V, 50 Hz; GB 4706.13 rating applies to the Chinese supply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia's 50 Hz frequency matches China's, so no frequency-related redesign is needed — a clear advantage. The only difference is nominal voltage (China 220 V vs Cambodia 230 V), which normally sits within the appliance's rated tolerance band. Confirm the rating-plate voltage range covers 230 V, validate protective and electronic components across the Cambodian supply tolerance, and verify the plug/socket interface. No compressor redesign or frequency conversion is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨50 Hz频率与中国相同，无需进行与频率相关的重新设计——具明显优势。唯一差异是标称电压（中国220 V对柬埔寨230 V），通常落在器具额定容差带内。请确认铭牌电压范围覆盖230 V，验证保护与电子元件在柬埔寨供电容差范围内有效，并核实插头／插座接口。无需压缩机重新设计或频率转换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨50 Hz頻率與中國相同，無需進行與頻率相關的重新設計——具明顯優勢。唯一差異是標稱電壓（中國220 V對柬埔寨230 V），通常落在器具額定容差帶內。請確認銘牌電壓範圍覆蓋230 V，驗證保護與電子元件在柬埔寨供電容差範圍內有效，並核實插頭／插座接口。無需壓縮機重新設計或頻率轉換。
